exemplar.title: How does Manjula Padmanabhan use the Prakash family in the play "Harvest" to highlight the key concept of identity and the role society has on shaping individuals?

detailedExemplarData.title: How does Manjula Padmanabhan use the Prakash family in the play "Harvest" to highlight the key concept of identity and the role society has on shaping individuals?

subject.title: English Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Literature focuses exclusively on the study of literature, developing students' appreciation and critical analysis of literary works from various cultures, periods, and genres. Students examine poetry, prose, and drama through close reading, comparative analysis, and exploration of literary techniques and themes. The course cultivates sophisticated interpretive skills and deep understanding of how literature reflects and shapes human experience across different cultural contexts.

strengths: Introduction clearly outlines the dystopian premise and links to the research question
Logical structure with clear headers (e.g., individual character sections) keeps the reader oriented
Conclusion succinctly synthesizes findings in relation to the research question
weaknesses: Occasional drift into broad social commentary reduces precision
Methodology is limited with minimal range of sources and inconsistent citation
Some digressions and repetition interrupt focus on the research question
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The work consistently communicates the topic and research question at an adequate level (band 3â4), but frequent digressions, repetition, and a limited methodology (band 1â2) prevent it from reaching the top of the band. Overall performance aligns with the lower half of the 3â4 band, so a score of 3 is appropriate.

strengths: Accurate recounting of plot details shows good knowledge of the play
Appropriate use of basic literary terms (e.g., âdystopia,â âstage directionsâ)
Effective incorporation of at least one secondary source to support claims
weaknesses: Integration of secondary sources is superficial and not critically interrogated
Analytical metalanguage is sparse, with some reliance on general vocabulary
Key observations (e.g., Maâs narcissism) are asserted rather than closely tied to textual evidence
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates good knowledge of the topic and mostly accurate use of terminology (band 3â4), but the uneven depth of integration and limited conceptual language place performance at the lower end of this band. A score of 3 reflects this level of proficiency.

strengths: Research is adequate and generally relevant, drawing on primary text plus several secondary sources
Some wellâchosen quotations (e.g., Jayaâs resistance) effectively support arguments
Argument structure around character portraits provides a clear line of inquiry
weaknesses: Analysis is uneven, with many claims remaining assertive rather than fully evidenceâbased
Critical evaluation of sources and counterâarguments is minimal
Conclusions sometimes restate findings rather than offer deeper evaluative insights
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Performance sits solidly within the 4â6 band: research and analysis move beyond description but lack consistent depth and critical evaluation. The work is stronger than the bottom of the band yet not sustained enough for the top, warranting a midâband score of 5.

strengths: Clear, logical structure with all required elements (title page, contents, introduction, bibliography)
Headings effectively segment character analyses, aiding navigation
Page numbering and word count are present
weaknesses: Citation style is inconsistent and URLs break across lines
Table of Contents omits page numbers
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Structure fully meets requirements (band 3â4), but layout and formatting issues (inconsistent citations, missing page numbers) restrict performance to the mid-band. A score of 3 reflects this balance of strengths and shortcomings.

strandSelections.reasoning: Method is limited.  Apart from the primary text, only a small handful of secondary articles are cited, some of which are descriptive rather than analytical.  Citation style is inconsistent and page references are sometimes missing.  There is little evidence of deliberate selection criteria or engagement with alternative critical viewpoints.  This reflects âlimited methodology with minimal range of sources.â

Basic layout choicesâtitle, word count, and some page numberingâare present, but citation style is inconsistent, several URLs are broken across lines, and the bibliography mixes formats.  These shortcomings indicate only partial adherence to formal presentation guidelines, corresponding to the 1-2 range.

The essay draws on the primary text plus 6â7 secondary references that are broadly relevant to identity, capitalism and technology, so the research is adequate and mostly linked to the question.  Yet the limited depth of engagement with those sources and the absence of contrasting scholarship prevent classification as âgoodâ (7-9).

The research question and main purpose are introduced early and remain generally visible throughout.  Paragraph topic sentences keep the reader oriented, and the focus on identity within the four family members is clear enough for an audience to follow.  Nevertheless, occasional drift into broad social commentary, repetition, and some disorganisation (e.g., long digressions about symbiosis or page-length plot summary) reduce overall precision.  The clarity therefore meets, but does not excel beyond, the âadequately communicatedâ level.

The argument is structured around four character portraits, providing a recognizable line of inquiry, yet counter-arguments and critical evaluation of sources are minimal.  Reasoning sometimes becomes repetitive or digressive, indicating a âgoodâ but not consistently critical discussion.

Analysis moves beyond descriptionâfor instance, linking Maâs fixation on the machine to societal devaluation of the elderlyâbut many claims remain assertive rather than evidenced, and several quotations are followed by explanation that merely restates the quote.  Logical progression is uneven, so conclusions are only partially supported.  This fits the lower end of the 4-6 band.

Required EE elements (title page, contents, introduction, bibliography, conclusion) are present and in a logical order.  Headings make navigation easy, although the body sections are uneven in length.  Overall, the structure meets IB expectations and merits the upper band for presentation.

The student recounts plot details accurately and shows sound knowledge of the playâs characters.  Secondary material is acknowledged and occasionally paraphrased, indicating a reasonable understanding, yet integration is superficial and seldom interrogated.  The work therefore demonstrates âgood knowledgeâ but not the coherence and sophistication expected for the top band.

Literary terms such as âcharacterisation,â âstage directions,â and âdystopiaâ appear and are mostly used correctly, but analytical metalanguage (e.g., motif, dramatic irony) is sparse and sometimes replaced by general vocabulary.  Consistency is moderate rather than sustained, placing the work in the middle band.

The question is explicitly stated and appropriately literary; links to the subsequent discussion are generally maintained as each character section is tied back to identity.  However, the formulation is rather compound and leads to partial rather than tight focus, with several passages sliding into class-struggle or technology debates only loosely tied to identity.  This aligns best with a âclearly stated but only partially focusedâ descriptor.

annotations.comment: The title is prominently placed and clearly indicates the Extended Essay subject, meeting formatting requirements.
The research question is overly compound and broad. Consider narrowing its scope and simplifying phrasing to maintain tight focus throughout the essay.
A clear word count is provided at the start, demonstrating compliance with EE formatting guidelines.
The Table of Contents lists sections but omits corresponding page numbers. Adding them will improve navigation and adherence to presentation standards.
The first paragraph contains extended plot summary; consider condensing descriptive elements to maintain a strong focus on the research question.
The âMa: Materialism over human lifeâ heading clearly segments character analysis, facilitating reader orientation in the body.
Incorporating Harwoodâs analysis strengthens the argument through external support and shows effective use of sources.
The section conclusion summarises findings rather than critically evaluating implications; develop evaluative insights for depth.
Bibliography entries show varied citation styles (journal article, website, thesis); adopt a single, consistent style (e.g., MLA or APA).
A URL entry is split across lines, which detracts from readability; ensure long links are formatted or hyperlinked consistently.
The unpublished thesis entry should specify repository details and date of submission to clarify its academic standing.
The entry âIntroduction.â uses a math tag, causing inconsistent formatting. Replace the math element with standard text for clarity.
The heading âTable of Contentsâ is well formatted and effectively organizes the essayâs structure, supporting reader navigation.
The introduction effectively outlines the dystopian premise and central themes, clearly communicating the topicâs relevance.
Parenthetical citations vary in format (e.g., Ravande 2 vs. Bedre & Giram 1). Standardize citation style for consistency.
The opening sentence introduces class and technology themes but drifts from identity; a clearer link to the research question would enhance coherence.
Analysis on capitalism and desperation is interesting but needs stronger ties to identity to avoid digression.
Restating the research question in body text is repetitive. Use this space for synthesis rather than repetition.
A sentence trails off mid-paragraph (âeven though Omâ); ensure complete sentences to maintain clarity and cohesion.
The description of Maâs narcissism is asserted but not sufficiently linked to specific actions or quotations; provide stronger textual evidence.
Integrate secondary source analysis more critically rather than summarizing stage directions; this will deepen your argument about Maâs choices.
The page numbering uses an inline math tag which is inconsistent with other pages; switch to plain text for pagination.
Grouping Jaya and Jeetu demonstrates a thoughtful comparative method that supports a coherent character-based approach.
The analysis of youth resistance remains surfaceâlevel; include socioâcultural context or theoretical frameworks to deepen understanding.
Consider integrating quotations into analysis rather than isolating them; this enhances flow and critical engagement with the text.
Quotations illustrating Jayaâs resistance are well-chosen and effectively support your argument on her autonomy.
The metaphor of commensalism feels forced and under-explained; clarify its relevance or select a literary metaphor more suited to Jeetuâs context.
Jeetuâs motivations are described but lack direct textual support; integrate more quotations to substantiate claims.
The section on Om is introduced with a clear header, supporting logical structure and alignment with the research question.
The claim that Om lacks personality is asserted rather than demonstrated; anchor this observation to specific dialogue or stage directions.
Consider discussing how gender dynamics intersect with class in Omâs role as provider to enrich the critical analysis.
The conclusion succinctly synthesizes how societal pressures shape each characterâs identity, effectively addressing the research question.
The conclusion omits reflection on methodological limitations; including this would demonstrate critical self-evaluation.
The bibliography is present and demonstrates adherence to formatting requirements, confirming thoroughness in documentation.
